Operation 'getLocationTypes' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description are too generic and lack specificity. The description doesn't explain what location types are used for, what fields are returned, or authentication requirements. Enhanced version provides domain context about location types' purpose in the inventory management system, clarifies the response structure, and specifies authentication requirements to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve the list of location types.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a complete list of all available location types that can be assigned to locations in Inventory Shield. Location types are used to categorize and organize different kinds of locations (e.g., warehouse, office, storage facility). Returns an array of LocationType objects containing type identifiers, names, and descriptions. No authentication required for this read operation.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic and lack specificity. The description doesn't explain what location types are used for, what fields are returned, or authentication requirements. Enhanced version provides domain context about location types' purpose in the inventory management system, clarifies the response structure, and specifies authentication requirements to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'validateApiKey' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_side_effects. Original description uses informal language ('good API Key') and lacks clarity about what validation means. Added specificity about authentication verification, return information, and clarification that it's a read-only operation for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: A simple endpoint just to verify that you have a good API Key
data.summary_suggestion: Verify API key validity and authentication
data.description_suggestion: Validates the provided API key to confirm it is valid and has proper authentication permissions. Returns authentication status and key details. No side effects - this is a read-only validation operation.
data.reasoning: Original description uses informal language ('good API Key') and lacks clarity about what validation means. Added specificity about authentication verification, return information, and clarification that it's a read-only operation for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all locations in the system. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Returns an array of Location objects containing location details including name, type, and metadata. Use pagination parameters to control result set size and offset.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks critical details about the 6 available parameters (filtering, sorting, pagination). Added information about parameter usage and return structure to help AI agents understand how to effectively query locations.

message: Operation 'createLocation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too minimal. Added details about required/optional request fields, return value structure, and side effects (location becomes immediately available for use). This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in response.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new location in the system. Accepts a CreateLocationRequest containing location name, type, and optional metadata. Returns the newly created Location object with assigned location ID and timestamps. The new location is immediately available for equipment tracking and image uploads.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. Added details about required/optional request fields, return value structure, and side effects (location becomes immediately available for use). This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in response.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific location by its ID. Requires the locationId path parameter. data.current_description: Retrieve the images associated with a location.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all images associated with a specific location. Requires the locationId path parameter. Returns an array of LocationImage objects containing image metadata, URLs, upload timestamps, and other image details. Returns an empty array if no images exist for the location.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about input requirements and return structure. Added clarity about the required locationId parameter and detailed what LocationImage objects contain, plus behavior when no images exist. This helps AI agents understand the complete request/response cycle.

data.current_description: Upload an image to a location.
data.description_suggestion: Uploads an image file to a specific location for equipment documentation and tracking. Requires the locationId path parameter and image file in the request body.
